name: sc4sap-lite
description: Lite, harness-portable edition of SuperClaude for SAP. Same knowledge (module SPRO/BAPI/tables/workflows for 14 modules + BC, industries, countries, ABAP clean-code conventions and templates), same MCP server (155 ADT tools), same personas — minus the multi-agent machinery. Procedures run as one agent following gated checklists; review happens in a fresh context; SAP itself verifies (syntax, activation, unit tests, ATC).

plugins.name: sc4sap-lite
plugins.description: SAP ABAP development and consulting — knowledge core + personas + gated procedures + ADT MCP server, in one lite plugin.
